prompt: Create a vertical 2K cinematic fantasy artwork of a celestial goddess archer floating full-body in the center of a dark cosmic void. She has long wild black hair blown dramatically to the left, her face partly shadowed, and an intense poised expression as she draws a glowing golden arrow across her chest. Her right arm pulls the bowstring near her cheek while her left arm extends straight outward holding an ornate crescent-shaped golden bow with sharp filigree tips. She wears intricate gilded armor over a translucent flowing ivory-gold gown, with delicate chains, leaflike metalwork, arm cuffs, and sheer fabric swirling around her legs like smoke. Surround her with one large luminous circular astrolabe halo behind her torso, thin geometric constellation lines, star points, dust particles, smoky nebula textures, and radiant golden energy emanating from behind her head and from beneath her feet. The color palette is black, deep charcoal, antique gold, warm amber, and soft ivory. Lighting should be dramatic backlit chiaroscuro with glowing rim light, sparkling particles, ultra-detailed metal engraving, ethereal fabric transparency, cinematic contrast, and a mythological high-fashion aesthetic. Add a small SocialSight wordmark in the top-left corner. No other text, no extra characters, no modern objects.
